summary: A DHS retweet of the White House post showing Markwayne Mullin's swearing-in as DHS Secretary in the Oval Office, with Trump speaking and the oath administered, captioned with a White House header banner. It is ceremony and speech footage with text overlay and no music.
notable_text: On-screen: 'Markwayne Mullin Officially Sworn In as DHS Secretary' / 'The WHITE HOUSE'.
